title: freesia juncea
intro: Freesia juncea is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, commonly known as the 'Freesia'. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Freesia juncea include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Freesia juncea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
